site.name: Stillwater Schools Finance Project
site.tagline: Independent research and analysis on the finances of Stillwater Area Public Schools (ISD 834).
site.hero_title: Following the dollars in Stillwater Area Public Schools.
site.hero_lede: A nonpartisan research effort that reads the audits, budgets, and levy filings of Independent School District No. 834 so that residents, journalists, and board members don't have to. We gather the primary documents, reconcile the numbers, and publish plain-language analysis of where the district's money comes from and where it goes.
site.as_of: Headline figures reflect the audited fiscal year ended June 30, 2025 (FY2024–25) and the district's published FY2025–26 budget.

collections.title: Analysis & Summaries
collections.blurb: Consolidated, reconciled financial summaries the project has prepared from the primary documents.

collections.title: Source Document Library
collections.blurb: Primary audited financial reports and official budget publications, saved here for direct reference. Grouped by document type.

collections.title: Reference & Methodology
collections.blurb: Working notes on how Minnesota school finance works, how district financial health is measured, and where the underlying public data lives.
